system.description:
What it does (SRD): Tremorsense lets the creature automatically sense the exact location of anything that is in contact with the ground within 20 ft., as long as the sensing creature is also in contact with the same ground (or bridge, floor, etc.). It still needs line of effect for targeting rules that require it.

ThirdEra: Tremorsense (20 ft.) is set on this item’s Details tab under Capability grants (vision and senses), not in Mechanical effects. The character sheet includes it with other senses; it does not add numeric attack or save bonuses on its own.
